name: twilio
description: Reads and writes Twilio public REST API v2010 resources through declarative JSON bundle streams and typed write actions.

risk.read: external Twilio API read of account, messaging, voice, phone-number, recording, SIP, usage, and related v2010 resources
risk.write: creates, updates, and deletes Twilio v2010 resources including messages, calls, phone numbers, recordings, queues, SIP resources, keys, and usage triggers
risk.approval: reverse ETL writes require plan preview and approval token; delete actions are marked destructive
